transcription.text: Everything's going wrong. Headache's back again. Take anything, Pat? These tablets worked fast and then, oof, bounced right back. Got something new. Vanquish. Vanquish? Mm, like capsules. What makes Vanquish so special? Well, your tablets probably didn't get to what caused your pain. Yes, sir. Is that what made my headache come back? It's likely. A Vanquish works different. Oh? I read that what causes most headaches is pressure on nerves, vascular nerves, and Vanquish acts on this pressure. Well, you're released so long-lasting, most headaches don't come back. Hope it works. For me? For what? You got rid of my headache. Not me. Vanquish. If you ever take more than two tablets, shouldn't you try Vanquish? New Vanquish. For relief so long-lasting, most headaches don't come back.
